sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الْكَبْسَةُ مِنَ الْأَطْبَاقِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ الْمَشْهُورَةِ فِي الْخَلِيجِ.
sentences.translation: Kabsa se smatra jednim od poznatih tradicionalnih jela u Zaljevu.
sentences.translationEn: Kabsa is considered one of the famous traditional dishes in the Gulf.

sentences.arabic: تَتَكَوَّنُ هَذِهِ الْوَجْبَةُ مِنَ الْأَرُزِّ الطَّوِيلِ وَاللَّحْمِ أَوِ الدَّجَاجِ مَعَ بَهَارَاتٍ خَاصَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj obrok se sastoji od dugog pirinča i mesa ili piletine sa posebnim začinima.
sentences.translationEn: This meal consists of long-grain rice and meat or chicken with special spices.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ أَفْرَادُ الْعَائِلَةِ حَوْلَ طَبَقٍ كَبِيرٍ لِتَنَاوُلِ الْغَدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Članovi porodice se okupljaju oko velikog tanjira da ručaju.
sentences.translationEn: Family members gather around a large platter to eat lunch.

sentences.arabic: يُضِيفُ النَّاسُ الْمُكَسَّرَاتِ وَالزَّبِيبَ لِتَزْيِينِ الطَّبَقِ وَتَحْسِينِ طَعْمِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi dodaju orašaste plodove i grožđice kako bi ukrasili jelo i poboljšali njegov ukus.
sentences.translationEn: People add nuts and raisins to garnish the dish and improve its taste.
